title: rename: add -unescape
body:
ASIC flows with some commercial tools rely on the transformation of escaped Verilog identifiers into simple identifiers by replacing some characters with underscores. Most notably, `a[0]` gets renamed to `a_0_`. This PR implements a new mode for `rename` that implements this and ensures no selected public name has to be escaped by `write_verilog`. Conflicts in renaming are resolved by appending numbering suffixes.

The current implementation approach relies on the verilog backend exposing its escaping logic in a new header, `verilog_backend.h`. In addition to seeing the test passes, reviewers may add `write_verilog` to its end and observe the end result is such that no wire names are escaped by the Verilog backend
